positive: A vibrant, stylized celestial owl perched on a crescent moon. The owl has intricate, detailed feather patterns rendered in deep indigo, gold, and teal. The moon glows with soft, ethereal light. Around the owl and moon are swirling cosmic dust and abstract nebula formations in complementary pastels and jewel tones. The composition is perfectly centered and highly symmetrical, featuring clean, strong silhouettes with minimal gradients to ensure high print readability. Style is neo-tribal, graphic, and luminous. Cinematic, high contrast, detailed linework, designed for apparel printing.
negative: blurry, noise, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, poor anatomy, low detail, grayscale, muted colors, messy, busy, asymmetrical, cropped
